modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook keeps crashing on macOS when trying to open it.

full_description_text:
- So, the user clicks on the Outlook icon to open it.  
- But then it just shuts down right away and shows an error message.  
- They keep hitting OK, but it just keeps happening over and over.
short_description: Outlook keeps crashing on macOS when trying to open it.
description:
- So, the user clicks on the Outlook icon to open it.  
- But then it just shuts down right away and shows an error message.  
- They keep hitting OK, but it just keeps happening over and over.
